deviations.what: The full upload cycle is backend/endpoint dependent, so it is reduced to client-side MessageToasts: 'Upload File' press shows an upload-started toast (original handleUploadPress ran checkFileReadable().then(upload)), and FileUploader.uploadComplete shows the hardcoded success message the original built (handleUploadComplete parsed a hardcoded 'Status: 200' response and toasted '(Upload Success)'). The uploadUrl='upload/' is kept 1:1.
